title: Middleware Service to Retrieve Object View Memberships
acceptance_criteria: Service accepts a Scorecard object ID and returns all associated views
Response includes view name and ID for each view
Returns an empty array if the object is not in any saved views
Service is reusable from the frontend UX layer
middleware_changes: New service method that queries the Scorecard-ErdViews relationship to return all views containing a given object. Uses Eloquent's many-to-many relationship between Scorecard and ErdViews models.
implementation_notes: The relationship between Scorecard and ErdViews is a many-to-many via a pivot table. The Eloquent query leverages the existing `erdViews` relationship on the Scorecard model. This service supports a future UX ticket for view switching on the object detail page.
comment_summary: Developer provided the Eloquent code snippet and confirmed the service works. Product owner noted this ticket supports another planned UX feature.
